시편 135:1.content: Praise Yah! Praise Yahweh’s name! Praise him, you servants of Yahweh,

시편 135:2.content: you who stand in Yahweh’s house, in the courts of our God’s house.

시편 135:3.content: Praise Yah, for Yahweh is good. Sing praises to his name, for that is pleasant.

시편 135:4.content: For Yah has chosen Jacob for himself, Israel for his own possession.

시편 135:5.content: For I know that Yahweh is great, that our Lord is above all gods.

시편 135:6.content: Whatever Yahweh pleased, that he has done, in heaven and in earth, in the seas and in all deeps.

시편 135:7.content: He causes the clouds to rise from the ends of the earth. He makes lightnings with the rain. He brings the wind out of his treasuries.

시편 135:8.content: He struck the firstborn of Egypt, both of man and animal.

시편 135:9.content: He sent signs and wonders into the middle of you, Egypt, on Pharaoh, and on all his servants.

시편 135:10.content: He struck many nations, and killed mighty kings,

시편 135:11.content: Sihon king of the Amorites, Og king of Bashan, and all the kingdoms of Canaan,

시편 135:12.content: and gave their land for a heritage, a heritage to Israel, his people.

시편 135:13.content: Your name, Yahweh, endures forever; your renown, Yahweh, throughout all generations.

시편 135:14.content: For Yahweh will judge his people and have compassion on his servants.

시편 135:15.content: The idols of the nations are silver and gold, the work of men’s hands.

시편 135:16.content: They have mouths, but they can’t speak. They have eyes, but they can’t see.

시편 135:17.content: They have ears, but they can’t hear, neither is there any breath in their mouths.

시편 135:18.content: Those who make them will be like them, yes, everyone who trusts in them.

시편 135:19.content: House of Israel, praise Yahweh! House of Aaron, praise Yahweh!

시편 135:20.content: House of Levi, praise Yahweh! You who fear Yahweh, praise Yahweh!

시편 135:21.content: Blessed be Yahweh from Zion, who dwells at Jerusalem. Praise Yah!
